course_title: Basic Data Skills for Economics and Business
description:
Offered: Fall
The course aims to introduce students to the basic data skills using mainly economic data sets. Topics covered will include locating the data sources for economic data; organizing and transforming data; presenting data including charts, simple descriptive statistics, and writing a summary report in economics. Students will learn how to find, present, and analyze economic data. The class will include hands-on experience with handling economic data.
Prerequisite(s): ECON 1100 or ECON 1200
